name: Sourdough Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add egg, applesauce, melted butter, sugar and salt to the starter and mix briefly.
2. Add flour until you achieve the desired consistency; mix until lump-free.
3. Just before baking, dissolve baking soda in a tablespoon of water and gently blend with the batter.
4. Pour 2 to 3 inch round pancakes onto a hot (400°F) griddle.
5. Cook for 2 to 4 minutes on one side, then turn and cook for an additional 2 minutes on the other side.
